item.title: This is Martin
item.description: Martin killed 35 innocent people and was sentenced to 35 life sentences, plus 1,652 years in prison Australia placed extensive restrictions on all firearms, including semi-automatic centre-fire rifles, repeating shotguns (holding more than five shots) and high-capacity rifle magazines. In addition to this, limitations were also put into place on low-capacity repeating shotguns and rim-fire semi-automatic rifles. We now have more guns than we did then but we have had no mass shootings. Maybe its time for the USA to do something, like restrictions on firearms and who can buy them and restrictions on the capacity of rounds that can be fired. waiting on 5000 down votes but how many more small kids need to die before people wake up
item.dc:creator: MickTaylorVRussellCoight

item.title: What can I say?
item.description:
21 ~ number of times The Onion has re-published its satirical headline in the past eight years: 'No Way To Prevent This,' Says Only Nation Where This Regularly Happens'
"Her parents came to her award ceremony that morning. They took her picture and oohed over her achievement. They went home while she finished her school day. Then they spent their night waiting for news about her. They had to give DNA samples and wait for the results because the bodies of these children were too mutilated to identify. Late last night, it was confirmed she was gone. Just like the teacher that made her certificate." ~ Katherine Lillian
item.dc:creator: blank666man

item.title: This is madness
item.description: [The point here is that he fails to see how his "pro-kyle," anti-Black, gun-centric-identity is responsible for his daughter's death. Gun free zones wouldn't have saved his daughter, but his entire toxic ideology absolutely killed her.]

item.title: TRIGGER WARNING - about Ulvalde Shooting - no gore
item.description:
1) the cops went and saved their own kids
2) but refused to go back in for anyone else - and actively prevented parents from rescuing
3) they stood around for half an hour after the shooting stopped
4) the grandmother called 911, they knew who he was, what he was driving, and that he was armed
5) DNA wasn't gathered as a formality. There were children left unrecognizable. Faces obliterated by the gunfire
6) this father learned that his daughter was dead white trying to save a girl who watched her die FRONT PAGE EDIT: thank you everyone who read and commented. It's pretty over whelming. While we need gun control, it's outside our individual hands at the moment. That said, in times of tragedy, it always helps to give blood. Be safe and be well.
item.dc:creator: AprilSpectrum

item.title: The BEST kind of Malcolm in the middle
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: A Picture Paints A Thousand Words
item.description: Republicans condone child killing. If you vote Republican, you condone child killing. If you don’t vote, or vote third party, you’re only helping republicans, and that means you condone child killing. It’s as simple as that. And as long as republicans have power, this will continue. On and on it goes. Because they want this. Remember of all this in November.
item.dc:creator: Thelrishlnquistion

item.title: It’s ok to not be ok
item.description: As an educator myself, this has been a hard year and week for my team and my kids. I need to remind myself and those around me in these concerning times to find a light in the darkness, so that we have the wherewithal to make a difference where and when we can. Take a moment to find your hope, find your joy, find your calm, so we can find a way to a better way forward for ourselves and the generations after us. Be safe, be strong, be well.
item.dc:creator: XoiZee

item.title: Imgur has become a doomscroll of the American shitshow.
item.description: About 4/5 of the front page is depressing American dysfunction. Have some kittens. It won't fix anything but it's nicer than seeing murdered kids and corrupt politicians.

Super cool
And it was never seen again
I'm going to a wedding on the British countryside this weekend and I'm really hoping it's gonna be something like this, haha
Bat boots are best boots
Happy Thursday guys!
item.dc:creator: Miiaka

item.title: Just a badass pic of Beto
item.description: Saw this pic of current Texas Governor candidate Beto o'Rourke disrupting Gov. Abbott after blaming the event on mental health issues. After Abbott cut mental health funding this year and last year lowered the age to buy a gun from 21 to 18….cause you know guns are less harmful than alcohol.
item.dc:creator: foxdye
